name: kubegram-server
description: Bun server with SSR and API routes for Kubegram

scripts.db:shell: docker exec -it kubegram-server-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d kubegram
scripts.db:reset: docker-compose down && docker volume rm kubegram-server_postgres_data && docker-compose up -d
scripts.build: echo 'No build step required for Bun server'
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck
scripts.test:integration: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && sleep 5 && bun test --run src/__tests__ && docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:integration:watch: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && sleep 5 && bun test --watch src/__tests__
scripts.test:e2e: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && sleep 5 && bunx playwright test && docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:e2e:ui: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && sleep 5 && bunx playwright test --ui && docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:e2e:debug: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && sleep 5 && bunx playwright test --debug && docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:ci: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && sleep 5 && bun test --run --reporter=junit src/__tests__ > test-results.xml && docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:all: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && sleep 5 && bun test --run src/__tests__ && bun run dev & sleep 10 && bunx playwright test && docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
